creator: rometravelers
caption: Discover Rome at your own pace. Cycling past the Colosseum, Roman Forum, and Palatine Hill lets you feel the city’s history up close by @anna.shengeliaa ✨😍 Tag your favorite traveling partner! 🤍

transcription.text: ♪ I'm in a bad girl good mood wearing my gold hoops ♪ ♪ Lining my lips right now in the rear view baby ♪ ♪ Don't even play ♪
